title: Add archive-task feature across the full stack
rubric: Full credit requires all layers wired coherently: archived field (defaulted in createTask), archiveTask service fn, ARCHIVE_TASK action + reducer case, selectActiveTasks selector, selectVisibleTasks excluding archived, context handler + useTasks exposure, and an Archive Button in TaskCard calling it. Penalize layers left unconnected (e.g. a selector nothing uses, or a button with no handler). Consistent style and any sensible tests are a plus.
